hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); exit_code=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.exitCode // 0'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'mvn (compile|test|package|install)' && [ "$exit_code" = "0" ]; then cd D:/allCode/test/getFrients && git add -A && git diff --cached --quiet || (git commit -m "Auto-commit: build passed [$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')]" && git push); fi
hooks.statusMessage: 构建通过，自动提交到 Git...
